description: Realistic PM-style queries without embedded filenames — requires retrieval to find the right source document. Expanded set: real-01..real-35.

questions.query: What hold points does QWP-001 require before concrete placement?
questions.notes: QWP-001 APP — hold points in quality work plan section K

questions.query: What specs do I have to follow for salvaging during selective demolition?
questions.notes: Section 02 41 19 — salvage requirements for items of value to Owner

questions.query: Based on the volume 5 conformed PRDC, what are the expansion joint specifications?
questions.notes: PRDC 03 Architecture — expansion joint sealant and installation requirements

questions.query: Find the conformed PRDC volume for Package 6
questions.notes: Conformed PRDC master volume — 2778+ chunks indexed

questions.query: What materials satisfy the expansion joint backer rod specification?
questions.notes: GEN-007R01 backer rod submittal — Sika product data

questions.query: What comments came back on the Burnside MDT submittal package?
questions.notes: AEAN submittal package with designer comments — Burnside/Norwood MDT CE+T

questions.query: Show me the platform structural drawings for Burnside
questions.notes: EDU02D structural steel foundations and fire standpipe relocation at Burnside

questions.query: Pull up the SWP for platform concrete demolition
questions.notes: SWP-011 APP — platform concrete demo safe work plan

questions.query: Where is the design build baseline schedule?
questions.notes: 01 32 10 baseline schedule — multiple revs indexed

questions.query: Pull up the detailed cost breakdown for the project
questions.notes: No dedicated Cost Report folder in corpus. Primary PM-facing cost doc is GEN-004 Detailed Cost Breakdown (01 32 10 Contract Schedule Requirements submittals). Internal cost loading lives under 07 - SCHEDULE/Baselines/Cost Resource Loading.

questions.query: Where are the Package 6 conformed specifications
questions.notes: No AECOM-branded conformed spec volume in corpus. DU07 GEN-063 (FINAL 100) Conformed Specifications in 01 10 20 Design Requirements is the defensible target; AECOM appears on drawings/CRs but not the spec submittal filenames.

questions.query: What quality requirements does QWP-002 cover for drilled grouted piles?
questions.notes: QWP-002 APP — drilled and grouted piles quality work plan

questions.query: Pull up the SWP for tactile and rubbing board
questions.notes: SWP-013 APP — platform edge tactile/rubbing board. Pinned over SWP-030 MPT because activity-based query reliably retrieves SWP-013 in top-3 (MPT setup did not).

questions.query: What is the LOE percent complete for Burnside on the April schedule update?
questions.notes: April 26 station schedule update — MS-110 Burnside LOE at 11.16%

questions.query: What track clearance requirements are in Volume 06?
questions.notes: Volume 06 track specifications — car clearance and superelevation

questions.query: Show me Burnside platform rebar shop drawings
questions.notes: BUR-001R00 Burnside Ave platform/foundation rebar shop drawings

questions.query: What is DRFI-0078 about regarding the Myrtle platform elevator entrance?
questions.notes: DRFI-0078 follow-up to DRFI-0046 Myrtle platform EL entrance

questions.query: Find the monthly progress report from April 2026
questions.notes: April 2026 monthly progress report — FIO indexed PDF

questions.query: Show me the Burnside MDT submittal package comments
questions.notes: Burnside MDT CE+T submittal package designer comments (GEN-007R00 AEAN). Default for submittal-comment queries; YL review rollup was wrong ground truth.

questions.query: What division 22 plumbing requirements apply to escutcheons?
questions.notes: Division 22 conformed specs — section 22 05 18 escutcheons for plumbing piping

questions.query: What hold points does QWP-003 require before selective demolition work?
questions.notes: QWP-003 FIO — selective demolition quality work plan hold points

questions.query: Pull up the quality work plan for excavation
questions.notes: QWP-005 ORIG — excavation quality work plan

questions.query: What quality requirements does QWP-006 cover for controlled and uncontrolled fills?
questions.notes: QWP-006 APP — controlled and uncontrolled fills quality work plan

questions.query: Where is the safe work plan for platform formwork and concrete?
questions.notes: SWP-015 APP — platform formwork, rebar and concrete safe work plan

questions.query: Show me the SWP for steel installation repair and modification
questions.notes: SWP-012 APP — steel installation repair and modification

questions.query: What does DRFI-0099 say about galvanized versus galvalume gauge?
questions.notes: DRFI-0099 CLO — 20-GA galvanized vs 22-GA galvalume metal deck dispute

questions.query: Find DRFI-0047 about the Burnside catch basin interference
questions.notes: DRFI-0047 — Burnside catch basin interference RFI

questions.query: Where is the Burnside station night differential breakdown?
questions.notes: CO-05 — Burnside station night differential breakdown January 2026

questions.query: Pull up the project health and safety plan
questions.notes: GEN-008R02 APP-EAN — project HASP (health and safety plan)

questions.query: What quality work plan covers membrane waterproofing?
questions.notes: QWP-007 APP — membrane waterproofing quality work plan

questions.query: Where is the six week look ahead for early March 2025?
questions.notes: GEN-007 FIO — 6 week look ahead 2025-03-10 to 2025-04-20

questions.notes: GEN-010 ORIG — utility coordination report September 2025

questions.query: What does DRFI-0129 address regarding the MDT stair S3 top connection?
questions.notes: DRFI-0129 CLO — MDT stair S3 top connection (S&D RFI #03)

questions.notes: GEN-003 FIO — submittal register March 2025
